'''gangolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradual|gradual]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradual|gradual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gangolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængeleth|gængeleth]] || [[word:gængelej|gængelej]] || [[word:gængelesh|gængelesh]] || [[word:gængele|gængele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangongoloth|gangongoloth]] || [[word:gangongoloj|gangongoloj]] || [[word:gangongolosh|gangongolosh]] || [[word:gangongolo|gangongolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangoloth|gangoloth]] || [[word:gangoloj|gangoloj]] || [[word:gangolosh|gangolosh]] || [[word:gangolo|gangolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangofloth|gangofloth]] || [[word:gangofloj|gangofloj]] || [[word:gangoflosh|gangoflosh]] || [[word:gangoflof|gangoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangolotho|gangolotho]] || [[word:gangolojo|gangolojo]] || [[word:gangolosho|gangolosho]] || [[word:gangoloko|gangoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangoloth|gangoloth]] || [[word:gangoloj|gangoloj]] || [[word:gangolosh|gangolosh]] || [[word:gangolo|gangolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangolothol|gangolothol]] || [[word:gangolojol|gangolojol]] || [[word:gangoloshol|gangoloshol]] || [[word:gangolokol|gangolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangolothotho|gangolothotho]] || [[word:gangolojojo|gangolojojo]] || [[word:gangoloshosho|gangoloshosho]] || [[word:gangoloko|gangoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangolothon|gangolothon]] || [[word:gangolojon|gangolojon]] || [[word:gangoloshon|gangoloshon]] || [[word:gangolokon|gangolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangolothoro|gangolothoro]] || [[word:gangolojoro|gangolojoro]] || [[word:gangoloshoro|gangoloshoro]] || [[word:gangolokoro|gangolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
